seoTitle: How to Add Recipients in a Brevo Campaign
metaDescription: Assign the right subscriber lists to a Brevo campaign using the recipient selector, segment rules, and exclusion folders to target precisely.
intro: Accidentally emailing the wrong audience or missing a core subscriber group is an easy mistake when a campaign's targeting isn't set up carefully. Brevo's campaign recipient selector lets you pick multiple lists, apply segment rules, and exclude specific contacts, giving you precise control over exactly who receives a broadcast.

steps.heading: Open the campaign setup wizard
steps.body: Start building your email campaign and navigate to the recipient configuration step in the setup flow.

steps.heading: Find the To configuration panel
steps.body: Locate the specialized 'To' panel where recipient lists and segments are assigned to the campaign.

steps.heading: Select multiple contact lists
steps.body: Check off multiple subscriber lists simultaneously if you want to widen your broadcast reach beyond a single list.

steps.heading: Apply segment rules
steps.body: Use real-time segment rules to narrow down recipients further based on specific contact attributes or behaviors.

steps.heading: Use exclusion folders and confirm counts
steps.body: Filter out specific unwanted contacts using exclusion folders, then track the live recipient count before saving your distribution parameters.

faq.question: Can I send a campaign to multiple lists at once?
faq.answer: Yes, the campaign recipient selector lets you check off multiple subscriber lists simultaneously.

faq.question: How do I exclude certain contacts from a send?
faq.answer: Use the exclusion folder feature to filter out specific contacts even if they belong to a targeted list.

faq.question: Can I see how many people will receive the campaign before sending?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo's campaign wizard dynamically calculates and displays the precise recipient total as you adjust your targeting.

faq.question: What are segment rules used for?
faq.answer: Segment rules let you narrow your audience further based on specific contact attributes rather than sending to an entire list.
